steps.title: Identify what the blank needs
steps.content: The blank fills "In ______ place" and refers back to "the types of pop culture references" — a plural noun. The blank needs a plural possessive pronoun.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — its: singular possessive; does not agree with the plural noun "types." ✗
  • Choice B — they're: contraction of "they are"; not a possessive at all. ✗
  • Choice C — their: plural possessive pronoun; correctly agrees with the plural antecedent "types." ✓
  • Choice D — it's: contraction of "it is"; not a possessive. ✗
That matches Choice C — their.
